get.description: Return all devices that belong to the authenticated user.
Return a single device by ID if it belongs to the authenticated user.
Get current user information and sync with OIDC
List all tasks owned by the current user.

post.description: Create a new task owned by the current user. Returns the created task.

patch.description: Update mutable fields of a task. All fields are optional; only provided fields are updated.

delete.description: Delete a task only if you are its owner and it is not used in routines owned by other users.

get.description: List all accepted friends of the current user.
List all pending friend requests sent TO the current user.

post.description: Send a friend request using a friend code.

delete.description: Remove a friend or cancel a request.
